allow: PowerShell($j = Get-Content data/processed/bajaj_gold_chunks.json -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json; $j.Count; $j | ForEach-Object { $_.char_count } | Measure-Object -Average -Minimum -Maximum | Format-List; $j[0..5] | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.chunk_id\) | p$\($_.page\) | $\($_.char_count\) chars | $\($_.section\)" })

PowerShell($j = Get-Content data/processed/bajaj_gold_chunks.json -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json; $j | Where-Object { $_.char_count -gt 4000 } | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.chunk_id\) | $\($_.char_count\) chars | $\($_.section\)" }; ""; "Under 200 chars:"; $j | Where-Object { $_.char_count -lt 200 } | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.chunk_id\) | $\($_.char_count\) | $\($_.section\)" })

PowerShell($g = Get-Content data/processed/bajaj_gold_chunks.json -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json; "=== dental ==="; $d = @\($g | Where-Object { $_.section -match 'Dental Treatment' }\)[0]; $d.text.Substring\(0, [math]::Min\(280, $d.text.Length\)\); "`n=== organ donor ==="; $o = @\($g | Where-Object { $_.section -match 'Organ Donor' }\)[0]; $o.text.Substring\(0, [math]::Min\(320, $o.text.Length\)\); "`n=== zone A ==="; $z = @\($g | Where-Object { $_.text -match 'clubbed in Zone A' }\)[0]; \($z.text -split "`n" | Select-String 'Zone A|Delhi'\) -join ' / ')
